name: HTTP Security Headers Comprehensive Audit
description: Comprehensive audit of all recommended HTTP security headers including CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy, Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy, Cross-Origin-Embedder-Policy, and Cross-Origin-Resource-Policy.
author: AC3 ScanForge
remediation: Implement all recommended security headers: Content-Security-Policy (restrict resource loading origins), Strict-Transport-Security (max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains; preload), X-Frame-Options: DENY, X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff, Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin, Permissions-Policy (restrict camera, microphone, geolocation), COOP: same-origin, COEP: require-corp, CORP: same-origin.
